extDescription.message: Import your Upwork, Fiverr or LinkedIn profile into Multifolio with one click.

success.message: Draft ready — review it in the Multifolio tab.

authNeeded.message: Log in to Multifolio first — click to open.

rateLimited.message: Import limit reached — try again in an hour.

emptyPage.message: Couldn't read enough profile text on this page.

captureSuccess.message: Job saved — find it in Multifolio › Jobs.

captureEmpty.message: Couldn't read the job title/description on this page.

pasteSuccess.message: Proposal inserted — review and submit yourself.

pasteNoProposal.message: No proposal yet — generate one in Multifolio first.

pasteNoBox.message: Couldn't find a cover-letter box — click into it first.
